metadata.text: You have a free weekend — which of these activities would you choose?

options.text: Read a non-fiction book and take notes

metadata.text: If asked to design a poster, which approach appeals to you most?

options.text: Interactive QR code and digital elements

metadata.text: Pick the product idea you’d be most excited to develop.
Choose the way you prefer receiving feedback.
You need to explain a technical concept to non-experts — how do you start?

options.text: Give the core definition and then examples
Ask the audience questions to gauge their level

metadata.text: Pick a way to validate a business hypothesis quickly.

options.text: Run a small ad campaign and measure sign-ups

metadata.text: Which classroom activity do you find most engaging?
Choose the tagline you’d use for a green startup.
Pick the innovation you think would have the biggest social impact.
Which problem would you prioritize solving at your college?

options.text: Better study spaces and quiet zones

metadata.text: Which learning resource fits your style?
Pick the way you’d test a new feature before launching.

options.text: Pilot with a small focused group

metadata.text: If you were to teach a short course, which format would you use?
Select the community initiative you'd champion.
If building a prototype, which material/process do you prefer?
Which entrepreneurial role appeals to you most?
Which ad headline would you choose for a student savings app?
What would you focus on when evaluating a startup pitch?
You have to summarize a complex paper in 100 words. Which is your main priority?

options.text: Make it engaging for broader audience

metadata.text: Pick a leadership style you admire.
When solving a puzzle, what do you try first?
Which collaboration tool would you pick for a remote team?
Choose a product improvement to prioritize:
Pick a favourite way to present data.
You’re building an MVP. Which metric is most important initially?
When reading code, what do you do first?

options.text: Start with tests or usage examples
Run the code and observe behaviour

metadata.text: Choose an approach to reduce churn.
Which hobby would you recommend for boosting creativity?
If you must pivot a product, what's the first data you look at?
Which problem-solving style fits you best?
Select a strategy to increase product virality.
If starting a side-hustle, which resource matters most to you?
Quantitative — A student scores 72 out of 90. What is the percentage?
Quantitative — In a class of 35 students, ratio male:female is 3:4. How many females?
Quantitative — A student walks to college at 3 km/h and returns at 2 km/h. Total time 5 hours. Distance (one-way)?
Data Interpretation — Bar chart with enrollments: CS=120, ME=80, EE=60, CE=40. Which course has 25% of total enrollment?
Analytical — Series: 3, 7, 16, 35, ?. Pattern *2+1, *2+2, *2+3, *2+4. Next number?
Logical Analogy — Doctor : Hospital :: Professor : ?
Deduction — If all cats are mammals and all mammals are animals, which is true?
Verbal — Synonym for 'Diligent'?
Analytical — Odd one out: Laptop, Smartphone, Tablet, Book
Coding-Decoding — If 'COLLEGE' -> 'FROOHJH', how is 'STUDENT' coded?
Spatial — A 3x3x3 cube painted outside: how many small cubes have exactly one face painted?
Problem Solving — Library has avg 510 visitors on Sundays, 240 other days. For a 30-day month starting Sunday, average per day?
Quantitative — Percentage increase: from 64 to 80, percent increase?
Ratios — In class of 45, boys:girls = 4:5. How many boys?
Profit & Loss — Buy at ₹1200, sell ₹1560. Profit %
Speed & Distance — Average speed of a trip at 60 km/h one way and 40 km/h return?
Time & Work — A in 12 days, B in 18 days. Together 3 days; how much left?
Simple Interest — ₹8,000 earns ₹2,400 in 3 years. Rate?
Mixtures — 40 L with milk:water = 3:1. How much water to add to make 3:2?
Algebra — If x - 1/x = 4, what is x^2 + 1/x^2?
Permutation — How many 4-digit even numbers from {1,2,3,4,5} w/o repetition?
Probability — Two dice rolled. Probability sum is prime?
DI — Company profits Q1=24, Q2=32, Q3=40, Q4=28. Total profit?
DI — Which quarter is exactly 25% of total profit?
DI — If Q3 increases by 25%, new Q3?
DI — Ratio (Q1+Q4) : (Q2+Q3)?
DI — Percentage decrease from Q3(40) to Q4(28)?
Analytical — Sequence 5, 12, 26, 54, 110, ?. What rule likely generates the sequence?

options.text: Double previous and add incremental even
Multiply by 2 and add sequentially increasing +1

metadata.text: Analogy — Book : Reading :: Knife : ____
Blood Relations — A is brother of B. B is mother of C. A is ____ to C?
Syllogism — All bottles are containers; Some containers are glass. Which conclusion follows?
Odd One Out — Triangle, Square, Rectangle, Cube. Which does not belong?
Coding-Decoding — If SMART -> VSDUW, what is PLANE?
Direction Sense — A walks 4 km north, 3 km east, 4 km south. Distance from start?
Puzzles — Four people A,B,C,D sit in row. A left of B; C right of D; D immediate right of A. Who is in middle?
Number Puzzle — If 3@5 = 19 and 4@6 = 28 then 7@2 = ?
Figure Pattern — Shape rotates 90° each step. After 5 rotations total rotation is:
Verbal — Select the closest meaning of 'Prudent'.
Verbal — Opposite of 'Scarcity'?
Sentence Correction — Choose the correct sentence.
Reading Comprehension — "Efficient systems reduce waste and maximize productivity." Inference?
Fill in the blank — He succeeded ___ hard work.
Higher-order problem: You have 3 projects. Which prioritization do you choose?
